objective: Optimize the salesforce workload over the real DuckDB source database by materializing derived objects that reduce measured execution cost while preserving exact query results.

visible_queries.sql: SELECT date_trunc('month', try_cast(b."last_login_date" AS TIMESTAMP)) AS metric_period, b."about_me" AS about_me, j."account_number" AS account_account_number, COUNT(*) AS row_count, SUM(b."extension") AS sum_extension FROM raw.user b JOIN raw.account j ON b."account_id" = j.id WHERE try_cast(b."last_login_date" AS TIMESTAMP) IS NOT NULL AND b."about_me" IS NOT NULL AND j."account_number" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY metric_period, about_me, account_account_number
visible_queries.normalized_sql: select date_trunc('month', try_cast(b."last_login_date" as timestamp)) as metric_period, b."about_me" as about_me, j."account_number" as account_account_number, count(*) as row_count, sum(b."extension") as sum_extension from raw.user b join raw.account j on b."account_id" = j.id where try_cast(b."last_login_date" as timestamp) is not null and b."about_me" is not null and j."account_number" is not null group by metric_period, about_me, account_account_number
filter_predicates: try_cast(b."last_login_date" AS TIMESTAMP) IS NOT NULL
